message: Jake
Fabar
Günter
− The next day −
I found it strangely concerning that Jennifer was
going to see someone.
It might be because I had gotten closer to her again, or it could be that I wanted to know her better.
So, would I be able to
have an interview today?
With such anxieties in mind,
I visited his place, and fortunately, I was able to catch him.
I'm about to head out, so please make it quick.
Sorry, I have something I wanted to ask.
Now, what exactly is the matter today? Miss Dern has already passed away; is there still something?
I truly apologize for bothering you when you’re busy, but I’d like to talk to you about Jennifer.
Jennifer?
The actress Jennifer Rumford, she's been getting counseling here.
Mr. Snipes, I would like to clarify that I am a psychiatrist, not your personal source of information.
I think I understand that well enough. However, regarding her symptoms,
I sought your cooperation as a friend in Miss Dern's case to help her.
However, it seems that Jennifer Rumford is here primarily for stress relief.
Saying she’s here for stress relief implies there must have been something in the past?
I have nothing more to say. Please leave. I am a very busy person.
ＲＲＲＲＲＲＲＲＲＲＲＲＲ
Excuse me?
Yuriko
Hello, is this the Boss?
Yuriko
What’s up?
Yuriko
It's bad, it's really bad!
Calm down, what happened?
Yuriko
Patricia has
been murdered, the director's daughter!
The director never dreamed, right after Guy and Kristy's funeral, he would have to hold his daughter's funeral.
I waited for the director to calm down and then visited his private residence in New York.
The director
This time, all I can say is
please don't say any more than that.
I still can't bring myself to accept that something happened to her.
The director
looked as if he had aged ten years.
The empty room appeared lifeless, seeming to reflect its owner's lack of vitality.
It's terrible.
The corpse, known as Patricia, was missing its head.
What!?!
Even if her clothes and belongings were hers, there's no way to recognize her without her face.
That was a shocking truth.
Patricia had been decapitated by the murderer.
This means the perpetrator is the same as in the previous serial murder cases.
Don't you think this must be the work of someone who has killed before?
It seems that's a possibility.
You, do you have any leads? Don't you know who the killer is?
Unfortunately, not yet.
Anyone will do, just bring the killer to me.
Then I'll cut off their head.
Saying this, the director collapsed on the floor, continuously calling out Patricia's name.
I stood there helplessly, embracing the director's shoulders.
